heading: Omitted
label: 1300k–4 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to transfers of land to the United States to be held in trust for the benefit of the bands, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–324, § 6108 Stat. 2158Sept. 21, 1994
